meta.title: Shaper: Data Shaper (very_low_power)
description: Shaper: Data Shaper (very_low_power) replays live-power input through the current shaper rather than solar-divert control.
Low available-power edge case. Useful for checking minimum-current behavior and avoiding unstable start/stop decisions.
Compare live power, smoothed live power, shaper maximum, available charge power, and actual charge power to see how the limiter reacts.
